description: Bill of debt, from 1519 CE– this estimate from FGP was proposed by Avraham David on the basis of the coinage mentioned: ""תשעה ושלושים אלפים ומאתים לבנים ממטבע האדון הצולטן סלים". This reference is most likely to Ottoman akçe, which roughly translates to "לבנים/white coins" in Hebrew and Turkish. Yehuda b. Avraham known as Deloya is taking an oath to repay his debt to Yehuda b. Ya'aqov known as Menahem. On Verso an approval by the debtor that he received part of the debt, signed by Yosef Karo.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
